subcodes.first_line: Your missive, which you had addressed to this servant present before the Throne, was laid before His countenance, ere the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب که بعبد حاضر لدی العرش نوشته بودید تلقاء وجه حاضر از قبل لوح
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
